title: SCP-001, The Prototype
description: An ancient anomalous creature capable of creating deadly singularities and fast attacks.
body:
The Prototype adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-001 also known as The Prototype. 


SCP-001 is a humanoid creature that appears after five in-game days, announced by a containment breach message. It possesses immense speed, strength, and resistance. When provoked, SCP-001 opens its mouth and reveals an eye to summons micro singularities that pull in and destroy anything nearby. However, bright light can weaken the anomaly, preventing teleportation and disabling its singularity ability. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-001 spawn?

SCP-106 only spawns after it is breached. Once this happens, he can randomly appear under a player.

► How can I make SCP-001 breaching?

With a Creative Item you can force SCP-001 to breach if SCP-001 has not yet breached.

Additionally, you can also set the gamerule "doPrototypeSpawn" to true so that SCP-001 can spawn.

</details>



![Prototype](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e2f8ae560795adebbded8077d770eb2d5c9447e.png)

SCP-001 is a tall, humanoid entity with large claws and a mouth with a glowing eye inside it. It becomes active after five or more days in the world, immediately triggering a containment breach message. With 350 health, regeneration and immense speed, SCP-001 is a dangerous predator. It hunts animals, players and villagers. When hostile, it can break blocks like wood and glass or open its mouth to reveal it's eye. After that, it will spawns a micro singularity inside the player if the player is still within 15 blocks. This mirco singularity pulls in all nearby entities except SCP-001 itself and killing them after six seconds. Below 280 health, SCP-001 can teleport to reposition itself, and if its health drops under 100, it may flee by teleporting awa, unless exposed to light levels above 8, where it becomes weak, slowed, and unable to teleport or generate singularities.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
